title: 5 things God builds in a man before he trusts you with more
caption:
God isn't withholding. He's building.

If you feel like you should be further along by now — a better job, a relationship, the thing you've been asking for — the frustration is real. But the delay isn't abandonment. It's formation.

Here are 5 things God builds in a man before he trusts him with more:

1. Faithfulness when no one's watching. You want the bigger stage. He wants to see if you'll show up to the smaller one without applause.

2. Prayer that outlasts the silence. You want the breakthrough. He wants to know if you still pray when it doesn't come.

3. Integrity when honesty costs you. Anyone can be honest when it's free. He's testing what you do when it costs you.

4. The humility to keep being shaped. The man who thinks he's arrived has stopped being formed. Stay teachable.

5. Contentment without complacency. Restlessness isn't ambition — it's evidence something besides God has hold of you. You can want more and still be at peace right now.

"One who is faithful in a very little is also faithful in much." — Luke 16:10

The man God trusts with more is the man who didn't let the waiting make him bitter.

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
